description: As the club's launch director, review three rocket designs (simple_model_rocket.ork, dual_parachute_deployment.ork, and clustered_motors.ork) located in ~/Documents/rockets/launch_day/. Obtain flight data including max altitude (m), max velocity (m/s), ground hit velocity (m/s), and stability margin for each rocket. Compile this data into a fleet summary CSV at ~/Documents/exports/fleet_summary.csv. Create a launch-day safety briefing at ~/Documents/exports/launch_day_briefing.txt that lists the rockets, flags any design with a ground hit velocity > 9 m/s or stability < 1.0 as UNSAFE, and provides a GO or NO-GO recommendation for each.
